packs.name: Coastal Modern
packs.dna: light wood tones, white and sand-colored upholstery, rattan or woven accents, linen textures, soft blue and seafoam accents only in decor items

packs.name: Urban Loft
packs.dna: dark leather seating, metal and reclaimed wood, concrete-toned accents, warm Edison-style lighting, muted earth tones in decor

packs.name: Farmhouse Chic
packs.dna: distressed white wood, warm neutral fabrics, shiplap-compatible pieces, antique brass hardware accents, soft cream and sage decor

packs.name: Minimalist
packs.dna: clean-lined low-profile furniture, neutral whites and warm grays, no clutter, one or two simple accent pieces maximum

packs.name: Mid-Century Modern
packs.dna: tapered wood legs, warm walnut tones, mustard or teal accent pillows only, organic curved shapes, clean geometry

packs.name: Scandinavian
packs.dna: pale birch wood, white and light gray upholstery, simple wool throws, minimal greenery, airy and uncluttered

packs.name: Bohemian
packs.dna: layered textiles, warm terracotta and cream tones, woven rugs, macrame or rattan accents, natural materials

architecture.callout: Ceiling fan blades are warped; dishwasher area lacks depth and realistic textures.

lighting.callout: Strong green color cast on the rug; shadows under furniture are too faint and generic.

perspective.callout: Furniture alignment is mostly correct, though the couch appears slightly elevated.

staging.callout: Furniture scale is good, but the TV is mounted too high and the foreground bin is messy.

architecture.callout: Fix distorted kitchen backsplash and artifacts around the ceiling fan.

lighting.callout: Add directional light from sliding door and improve furniture contact shadows.

perspective.callout: Correct the skew on the shelving unit and align coffee table better with the rug.

staging.callout: Simplify shelf decor to remove AI blobs and reduce coffee table scale.

architecture.callout: Ceiling fan is a hallucinated mess; green artifacts appear on kitchen counters.

lighting.callout: Shadows under furniture are unnaturally dark and don't match ambient light sources.

perspective.callout: Rug orientation clashes with floor tile grout lines; coffee table looks skewed.

staging.callout: Coffee table is disproportionately large; rug is too small for the seating area.

architecture.callout: Kitchen cabinetry is severely warped and lacks structural integrity.

lighting.callout: Harsh floor glare contrasts with flat, unrealistic shadows under the furniture.

perspective.callout: Coffee table and rug align with floor lines but feel slightly ungrounded.

staging.callout: Furniture is too sparse and basic; kitchen clutter ruins the staged aesthetic.

architecture.callout: Basic structure preserved but ceiling fan and vent integration is messy.

lighting.callout: No realistic shadows under the dining set; lighting is overly flat.

perspective.callout: Rug angle conflicts with floor tiles; right-side chair perspective is skewed.

staging.callout: Furniture style is cohesive but sofa scale is too small for the room depth.

architecture.callout: Ceiling fan is distorted and heavy compression hides wall/ceiling transitions.

lighting.callout: Flat lighting with no realistic shadows or light bounce from the exterior source.

perspective.callout: Furniture follows basic vanishing points but lacks grounding on the tiled floor.

staging.callout: Extremely low resolution and poor asset integration make this unusable for MLS.

architecture.callout: Ceiling fan blades are warped; kitchen cabinet edges are blurry and lack definition.

lighting.callout: Missing contact shadows under the sofa and coffee table create a floating effect.

perspective.callout: The rug and coffee table do not align correctly with the floor tile grid lines.

staging.callout: Furniture style is cohesive, but the foreground table is scaled too large.

architecture.callout: Walls and ceiling lines are sharp and structurally sound.

lighting.callout: Overexposed highlights and weak contact shadows create a flat, artificial look.

perspective.callout: Excellent alignment of the bed and bench with the room's geometry.

staging.callout: Furniture is well-scaled, but the overall aesthetic feels clinical and lacks texture.

architecture.callout: Left doorway is warped and wall textures show significant AI artifacts.

lighting.callout: Harsh, unrealistic shadows and neon-orange lamp glow lack natural falloff.

perspective.callout: Bench at foot of bed is skewed; console table doesn't sit flush with the wall.

staging.callout: Heavy, dark furniture choices overwhelm the small room and feel poorly scaled.

architecture.callout: Structural lines, walls, and door frames are perfectly preserved and straight.

lighting.callout: Lighting is washed out and flat; lamps lack realistic glow and shadow depth.

perspective.callout: Bed feels slightly disconnected from the floor; rug perspective is a bit skewed.

staging.callout: Rug texture is messy and distracting; low resolution obscures staging details.

architecture.callout: Room structure is perfectly preserved with no warping or hallucinations.

lighting.callout: Artificial lamp glow lacks natural fall-off; shadows are inconsistent with ambient light.

perspective.callout: Bed and nightstands are accurately placed within the room's 3D space.

staging.callout: Bedding looks overly stiff and synthetic; rug placement feels slightly undersized.

architecture.callout: Ceiling fan is a distorted hallucination; floor lacks realistic material definition.

lighting.callout: Lighting is overly flat; shadows under the bed don't match the bedside lamp sources.

perspective.callout: Bed and nightstands align well, but the accent chair feels disconnected from the floor.

staging.callout: MCM style is cohesive, but heavy pixelation and scaling issues reduce the premium feel.

architecture.callout: Fix the severe artifacts on the left door and the distorted window blinds.

lighting.callout: Lighting is flat and overexposed; needs depth and realistic shadow casting.

perspective.callout: Bench and bed lack proper contact shadows, making them appear to float.

staging.callout: Resolution is too low for professional use; textures and decor lack any detail.

architecture.callout: Ceiling and wall behind bed show heavy AI artifacts and structural hallucinations.

lighting.callout: Lighting is extremely flat with no realistic shadow casting from lamps or furniture.

perspective.callout: The green chest and pet steps appear tilted and don't sit naturally on the floor.

staging.callout: Cluttered layout with poorly scaled wall art and jarring color choices for furniture.

architecture.callout: Severe masking errors and color bleeding on cabinets; structural lines are distorted.

lighting.callout: Flat, artificial lighting with no contact shadows or realistic light interaction.

perspective.callout: Island and stools appear to float due to lack of perspective-aligned shadows.

staging.callout: Aggressive green color application looks like a digital glitch rather than staging.

architecture.callout: Masking for green cabinets is sloppy, bleeding onto the floor and white trim.

lighting.callout: Stools lack realistic contact shadows and don't react to the room's light sources.

perspective.callout: Stools are angled incorrectly relative to the island and floor grid.

staging.callout: Low-quality assets and poor image resolution render this unusable for marketing.

architecture.callout: Green cabinet masking is imprecise and bleeds onto the white trim and appliances.

lighting.callout: Lack of contact shadows makes the island and countertop items look floating.

perspective.callout: The island's base does not align with the perspective of the floor tile grid.

staging.callout: Unusable resolution and flat color fills lack any realistic material texture.

architecture.callout: Severe pixelation and compression artifacts obscure all fine architectural details.

lighting.callout: Lighting is extremely flat with no realistic contact shadows or light falloff.

perspective.callout: Basic vanishing points are correct but edges are jagged and poorly defined.

staging.callout: The green cabinet overlay is a flat color block lacking realistic texture and finish.

architecture.callout: Correct warped cabinet lines and fix the unnatural green color masking on base units.

lighting.callout: Introduce realistic shadows and fix overexposed areas to create depth and realism.

perspective.callout: Ground the floating side table and floor lamp to match the floor's vanishing point.

staging.callout: Remove the floor lamp and side table; they are illogical for a kitchen workspace.

architecture.callout: Cabinet recoloring is flat and masks textures; pixelation obscures fine details.

lighting.callout: Complete lack of contact shadows makes the island and stool appear to float.

perspective.callout: Stool angle is slightly inconsistent with the island's vanishing points.

staging.callout: Jarring color palette and low-res assets are unsuitable for professional listings.

architecture.callout: Fix messy cabinet edges and improve resolution to define wall boundaries.

lighting.callout: Balance window exposure and add directional shadows for realistic depth.

perspective.callout: Adjust rug alignment and ground the bar stools more firmly to the floor.

staging.callout: Reduce counter clutter and choose a more neutral, modern color palette.
